recalls.Description: Five Below is recalling the Room2Room LED Iridescent Bear Lights due to potential fire and burn hazards. These lights are approximately 7.5 inches tall and 9.3 inches wide, featuring a USB plug with an on/off switch. Identifying information includes the model number 'LD-0030' and a UPC code of '1922340368444' found on the packaging. Consumers are advised to be cautious as the power switch on the USB cord may overheat and melt.
recalls.Title: Five Below Recalls Room2Room LED Iridescent Bear Lights Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Five Below at 844-452-3569 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at Recalls@FiveBelow.com, or visit https://www.fivebelow.com/info/five-below-recalls-led-iridescent-bear-light. More details can also be found under 'Product Recalls' on their website.

Images.Caption: Recalled Room2Room LED Iridescent Bear Light
Location of label under the recalled Room2Room LED Iridescent Bear Light

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 28 reports of the USB cord overheating and melting, including six reports of burns to fingers. There were also two reports of property damage, including burns to a wall and a headboard.

Retailers.Name: Available at Five Below stores nationwide and online at fivebelow.com from September 2024 to February 2025 for approximately $12.

Distributors.Name: Five Below Inc., of Philadelphia, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to overheating power switch

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lights and return them for a full refund or contact customer service

recalls.metaDescription: Five Below recalls LED Iridescent Bear Lights due to fire and burn hazards. Learn how to return for a refund.

recalls.Description: BlockBlueLight is recalling the Multi-Mode Sleep Lamp (model BBL-MM-LAMP) due to potential fire and burn hazards associated with its lithium-ion battery. This lamp features three color modes: Noblue Amber (yellow), Sunset Mixed (orange), and Twilight Red (red). It has dimensions of approximately 6.3 inches by 5.5 inches by 3 inches. Consumers are advised to handle the recalled batteries according to local regulations and not to dispose of them in regular trash or recycling bins.
recalls.Title: BlockBlueLight Recalls Multi-Mode Sleep Lamps Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach BlockBlueLight Limited at 917-277-8422 from 2 p.m. to 10 p.m. ET, Sunday through Thursday, email at product@blockbluelight.com, or visit https://www.blockbluelight.com/pages/multi-lamp-recall.

Images.Caption: Model number printed on base of the recalled lamp

Retailers.Name: Available online at https://www.blockbluelight.com from December 2023 to November 2024 for approximately $80.

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to overheating lithium-ion battery

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lamps, request a full refund, store credit, or a replacement lamp, and dispose of them per local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: BlockBlueLight recalls Multi-Mode Sleep Lamps due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund or replacement.

recalls.Description: Tala North America is recalling its Muse Portable Lamps, which are identified by batch codes 01/21, 01/22, 01/23, and 01/24. These battery-operated lamps, available in various colors including brass, green, white, blue, red, black, and pink, measure approximately 13 inches by 5 inches by 5.5 inches. The batch codes can be found on the base of each lamp.
recalls.Title: Tala North America Issues Recall for Muse Portable Lamps Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Tala North America at 800-408-2226 from 4 a.m. to 1 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also email productquality@tala.co.uk or visit talalighting.com/pages/the-muse-bulb-replacement-program-safety-recalls for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Brass
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Blue
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – White
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Black
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Red
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Pink
Recalled Tala Muse Portable Lamp – Green
Batch code can be found on the base of the product

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of a battery overheating, causing a fire that resulted in property damage to a side table and bed. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at West Elm, One Kings Lane, Lumens, Lulu & Georgia, Lightology, and Anthropologie from September 2021 to July 2024, priced between $275 and $495.

Importers.Name: Tala North America Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of fire due to overheating lithium battery and lightbulb failure

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lamps and contact Tala North America for a free replacement bulb. A replacement request form must be completed, including a photo of the product and the number of recalled bulbs. Consumers should dispose of the bulbs safely, and replacement bulbs will be sent at no cost.

recalls.metaDescription: Tala North America recalls Muse Portable Lamps due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a free replacement bulb.

recalls.Description: Jo-Ann Stores has announced a recall of its Place & Time® battery-operated desk lamps, which come with a USB charging cord. These lamps are available in three colors: green (model number 4843351B), pink (model number 4843351A), and cream (model number 4843351D). The model number can be located on the label on the bottom of the lamp. The lamps measure approximately 12 inches in height when fully extended and about 4 inches in width at the base.
recalls.Title: Jo-Ann Stores Issues Recall for Place & Time Battery-Operated Desk Lamps Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can contact Jo-Ann Stores at 833-931-0230 from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email customer.service@joann.com, or visit www.joann.com/product-recalls. Alternatively, visit www.joann.com and click on 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Place & Time battery-operated desk lamp with USB cord (green)
Recalled Place & Time battery-operated desk lamp with USB cord (pink)
Recalled Place & Time battery-operated desk lamp with USB cord (cream)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the battery compartment melting or popping while the lamp was charging with the USB cord. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Jo-Ann Stores nationwide and online at www.joann.com from May 2024 to July 2024 for approximately $23.

Importers.Name: Jo-Ann Stores LLC, of Hudson, Ohio

Hazards.Name: Overheating battery compartment posing a fire hazard

Remedies.Name: Stop using the lamps and return them for a full refund. Without a receipt, customers will receive a $23 store credit. For those unable to return in-store, email a photo of the receipt to customer.service@joann.com with the subject 'Desk Lamp Recall Refund' for an electronic gift card or $23 store credit.

recalls.metaDescription: Jo-Ann Stores recalls Place & Time battery-operated desk lamps due to fire hazards. Learn how to return for a refund or store credit.
